data.name: Roommate
data.detailed_description:
Roommate is a complete Visual Novel that puts you in the place of its characters.
You will have multiple alternative routes and several roommates as pleasant as each other.



This game contains two chapters.

In the first one,
You will play as Alvin who is in love with Naomi - his lovely roommate - but unfortunately in a relationship with a moron.
You will help her break up or stay with him, but it will have consequences.
For a duration of about an hour, this chapter is short but very cute.

In the second one, you can choose your point of view between the roommates:
- Issa, a kind and eccentric man
- Amy, a shy young geek who loves video games
- and Valerie, the lovely new roommate who will disrupt their routine
For a duration of about 2-3 hours, this chapter is rather complete.

- Amy, a shy young geek who loves video games

For a duration of about 2-3 hours, this chapter is rather complete.
data.short_description: Two young people under the same roof. Living together brings them closer. Anything could happen.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.50 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
